title: My Work Updates Slowly
excerpt: The My Work feature is functioning overall, but we’re experiencing significant delays in how quickly it updates based on changes made to items on the boards. We’re consistently seeing lag times of 30 to 120 seconds betwe…

posts.author: RMNornes (Ross Nornes)
posts.cookedHtml:
The My Work feature is functioning overall, but we’re experiencing significant delays in how quickly it updates based on changes made to items on the boards. We’re consistently seeing lag times of 30 to 120 seconds between actions like adding items (with a person and due date assigned), updating due dates, or marking items as done, and those changes being reflected in My Work.

Is anyone else noticing similar issues or delays? Has anyone found a solution?

We’ve tried several troubleshooting steps—shift-refreshing the page, clearing the cache, using different browsers, and running My Work in incognito mode—but nothing has resolved the delay. In all scenarios, the lag between the board updates and My Work syncing persists in that 30 to 120 second range.
